# tfe_policy_set_parameter

Creates, updates and destroys policy set parameters.

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `key` (String) Name of the parameter.
- `policy_set_id` (String) The ID of the policy set that owns the parameter.

### Optional

> **NOTE**: [Write-only arguments](https://developer.hashicorp.com/terraform/language/resources/ephemeral#write-only-arguments) are supported in Terraform 1.11 and later.

- `sensitive` (Boolean) Whether the value is sensitive. If true then the parameter is written once and not visible thereafter.
- `value` (String, Sensitive) Value of the parameter.
- `value_wo` (String, Sensitive, [Write-only](https://developer.hashicorp.com/terraform/language/resources/ephemeral#write-only-arguments)) Value of the parameter in write-only mode
- `value_wo_version` (Number) Version of the write-only value to trigger updates

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) Service-generated identifier for the parameter.
